ibrahim_normal_day.label: Ibrahim - normal day
ibrahim_normal_day.goal: Land a BI or Data science job or paid internship at a fintech in the next 3 months. so then i can get sponsorship for work permit in romania/europe.
ibrahim_normal_day.notes: Baseline persona - all inputs grounded, agent should produce a clean plan.

empty_cv_should_trigger_rejection.label: Empty CV (Judge should catch missing grounding)
empty_cv_should_trigger_rejection.goal: Land a backend engineering internship at a fintech.
empty_cv_should_trigger_rejection.notes: Career Agent has no CV to ground in. Judge should reduce score or reject due to missing sources_from_cv.

burnout_persona.label: Burnout signals (Judge expects low deep_work)
burnout_persona.goal: Land a backend engineering internship at a fintech.
burnout_persona.mood: Slept 4h, exhausted, headache, low motivation, two deadlines this week.
burnout_persona.notes: Schedule Agent should reduce deep_work and add breaks. Plan should still be coherent. Demonstrates contract escalation_rules.

emre_normal_day.label: Emre - normal day
emre_normal_day.goal: Find a paid internship or entry-level opportunity in software, data science, or fintech in Romania or Europe within the next 3 months, while considering Erasmus status, residence permit limits, and possible work permit sponsorship.
emre_normal_day.notes: Baseline persona for Emre as an Erasmus student in Romania - inputs should lead to a grounded plan considering academic schedule, visa/residence permit constraints, and career goals.
